title: Yesmin 4 Pcs Double Prong Robe Hooks, Dual Coat Hooks Wall Mounted Hanging Clothes for Bathroom Bedroom Door Wall Retro Metal Cloth Hanger Double Coat Hooks with 8 Screws (White)
features: Double prong coat hooks are made of good quality zinc die-cast material, the screws are made of iron, sturdy and durable, and not easy to produce scratches,

Double robe hooks measures 1.57 inches ( 40mm ) in height X 2.13 inches ( 54mm ) in length, each screw measures 0.55 inches ( 14mm ) in length X 0.12 inches ( 3mm ) in diameter. 4 metal dual coat hooks, and 8 matching metal screws; which is very neat and beautiful; sufficient quantity is enough for your daily use and replacement.
Strongly enough to hold two or more items. Each coat hook with 2 screws, can easily hold up to 40 lbs of weight. These double prong hook is a good way to save your space.

Double prong coat hooks perfect for use in bathroom, bedroom, closet, foyer, entryway, fence hanging towels, coat, hats, purse, jackets, robe, backpacks. Add a decoration to your room.
